questionHtml: State what your conclusion means in context.
markschemeHtml:
there is (significant evidence of) a difference between the (population) mean reaction times        A1


Note: Their conclusion in (c)(ii) must match their conclusion in (c)(i) to earn A1. Award A0 if their conclusion refers to mean reaction times in the sample.

 

[1 mark]
